start.speaker: Aria
start.text: Oh! A new student? Welcome to Spellcaster Academy. I'm Aria — second year, fire specialisation. Word of advice: don't wander into the Dueling Grounds alone on your first day.

choices.label: I think I can handle myself.

aria_intro_response.speaker: Aria
aria_intro_response.text: Nice to meet you, [Player]. Hmm, there's something about you... You might actually be interesting. Come find me when you're settled in — I have a feeling we'll be seeing a lot of each other.

aria_intro_bold.speaker: Aria
aria_intro_bold.text: Ha! Confident. I like that. Most first-years are practically shaking on arrival. Alright, prove it then — come find me at the Dueling Grounds sometime.

aria_intro_challenge_tease.speaker: Aria
aria_intro_challenge_tease.text: *grins* Maybe it is. We'll see how strong you are once you've got your bearings.

aria_intro_end.speaker: Aria
aria_intro_end.text: Anyway, I should get back to my studies. See you around, [Player].

returning_greeting.speaker: Aria
returning_greeting.text: Hey, [Player]! Settling in alright? The first week is always overwhelming, but you'll find your footing.

choices.label: Can you tell me more about the Academy?
I'd like to challenge you to a duel.

aria_about_academy.speaker: Aria
aria_about_academy.text: The Academy is divided into four specialisations: Fire, Ice, Arcane, and Light. Each has its own wing and faculty. Most students have a natural affinity, but some are elementally neutral — which means they can learn from all schools.

aria_elements_debate.speaker: Aria
aria_elements_debate.text: Fire, obviously. Speed, aggression, and pure damage. Ice is defensive but slow. Arcane is powerful but mana-hungry. Light is healing — useful, but not exactly intimidating.

aria_challenge_accept.speaker: Aria
aria_challenge_accept.text: Oh! Finally! I was starting to think you'd never ask. Meet me on the Dueling Grounds — we'll see what you're made of. I won't hold back!

post_challenge_check.speaker: Aria
post_challenge_check.text: Still thinking about our duel? I'm ready whenever you are.

aria_just_checking.speaker: Aria
aria_just_checking.text: Ha, sure. I'll be here. Come find me when you want to talk — or duel.

friend_greeting.speaker: Aria
friend_greeting.text: Oh, [Player]! I'm glad you're here. I've been thinking... you know how I always push myself so hard? The truth is, I'm trying to prove myself to someone. My older sister was the top student here, and everyone expects me to surpass her.

choices.label: That sounds like a lot of pressure.
You should just focus on yourself.

aria_friend_pressure.speaker: Aria
aria_friend_pressure.text: Yeah... it really is. But talking to you about it helps. Thanks for listening. *she smiles warmly* You're a good friend, [Player].

aria_friend_focus.speaker: Aria
aria_friend_focus.text: You're right. I... I know. It's easier said than done, but you're right. Maybe I should stop competing with her ghost and just be myself.

story_scene_greeting.speaker: Aria
story_scene_greeting.text: I've been looking for you. There's something I need to tell you — something I haven't told anyone. About my sister, and why she really left the Academy.

aria_story_reveal.speaker: Aria
aria_story_reveal.text: She didn't just leave. She was expelled. For using forbidden magic. The headmaster covered it up to protect the Academy's reputation. I've been trying to figure out why she did it — and I think it has something to do with the sealed vault beneath the library.

choices.label: I'll help you find out the truth.

bonded_greeting.speaker: Aria
bonded_greeting.text: [Player]... you know, when I first met you, I thought you were just another wide-eyed first-year. I had no idea you'd become this important to me. Whatever happens with the vault — I'm glad you're by my side.
